productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Solid Grey Track Pants
description: Composition Grey trackpants made of 100% polyester, has a mesh inner lining, elasticated waist with a drawcord, zippered pockets on the sides, doggle straps at the hems, green paneling from the waist to the thigh, and heat transferred brand logo on the left thighFitting Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 30 degrees Do not soak or bleach Do not tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/trims/logo Crafted to offer absolute comfort during your training sessions, these trackpants are created from 100% polyester with a mesh lining to wick sweat away from your body and keep you feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Add on a T-shirt and sneakers for a sporty look.Model statistics The model wears trackpants of length 41.5"Height-6.1", Waist-31"
